rationale: Educ. Code §37.208 governs on-site school safety technical assistance. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal, so no conflict exists.
quote:
Sec. 37.208. ON-SITE ASSISTANCE. On request of a school district, the center may provide on-site technical assistance to the district for:
(1) school safety and security audits; and
(2) school safety and security information and presentations.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict.
